chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt.Petition No.D-50 of 2019. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections ‘A’. 2. For orders on maintainability of M.A.No.258/2019. 3. For orders on maintainability of main case. 03.05.2023 Mr. Ghulam Dastagir Shahani, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl.A.G Sindh. =*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*= After arguing the matter at some length, it was stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that he would not press the disposal of instant petition before this Court, provided the petitioner is permitted to exhaust his remedy before the Civil Court having jurisdiction, in accordance with law irrespective of earlier litigation, if any, which is not opposed by learned Addl.A.G Sindh. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
